---
title: "Open Source Contributions"
---

## Overview

**104 merged pull requests** across **24 unique repositories** with combined stars of **439,554+ ⭐**

My contributions focus on:
- 📚 **Documentation** - Clarifying complex concepts, fixing broken links
- 🔧 **Features** - Adding new functionality and examples
- 🧪 **Testing** - Improving test coverage and CI/CD
- 🎓 **Community** - Creating notebooks and examples for learners

---

## Major Projects

### HuggingFace Ecosystem
**25+ merged PRs** across Diffusers, Transformers, Notebooks, TRL, and more

Key contributions:
- Added community notebook examples for Diffuser scripts (8 PRs)
- Fixed documentation and broken links across multiple repos
- Improved example scripts with optimization techniques
- Updated model cards (Jamba, Mamba, ModernBERT, Encoder Decoder)
- Extended pipeline support for callbacks and features

[View all HuggingFace PRs on GitHub →](https://github.com/search?q=author%3AParagEkbote+org%3Ahuggingface&type=pullrequests)

---

### LinkedIn Liger-Kernel
**11 merged PRs** - ML kernel optimization library

Contributions:
- Created comprehensive documentation from scratch
- Fixed deployment issues for MkDocs site to GitHub Pages
- Added pytest coverage configuration
- Enhanced docs and fixed broken links
- Added project classifiers and improved CI/CD

[Liger-Kernel on GitHub →](https://github.com/linkedin/Liger-Kernel)

---

### Optuna & Optuna Integration
**13 merged PRs** - Hyperparameter optimization framework

Work included:
- Type-checking updates across multiple modules
- Added new examples (Transformers, Comet, SHAP, PyCMA)
- Migrated `.coveragerc` to `pyproject.toml`
- Added Trackio integration examples
- Improved documentation and examples

[Optuna on GitHub →](https://github.com/optuna/optuna)

---

### PrunaAI
**13 merged PRs** - AI optimization and efficiency library

Contributions:
- Created end-to-end tutorials for model compression
- Fixed CI/CD issues and reduced flakiness
- Improved pre-commit configurations
- Added compatibility matrices to documentation
- Fixed namespace package conflicts

[PrunaAI on GitHub →](https://github.com/PrunaAI/pruna)

---

### PyTorch
**2 merged PRs**

- Added example using `torch.autograd.functional.jacobian`
- Improved CUDA documentation and garbage collection docs

[PyTorch on GitHub →](https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch)

---

### Additional Repositories

**Distilabel** - Data processing for ML
- Added legend to component gallery icons

**Observers** - Research framework
- Setup and documentation improvements

**LlamaFactory** - LLM fine-tuning framework
- Added Trackio integration

**Lighteval** - Model evaluation
- Deprecated obsolete config properties

**Lightning-AI LitGPT** - Training framework
- Model deprecation documentation

**Skorch** - PyTorch scikit-learn wrapper
- Contributing guidelines
- Learning rate scheduler notebook
- Optuna integration example
- pyproject.toml improvements

**NannyML** - ML metrics book
- Documentation improvements

**mlabonne/llm-datasets** - LLM datasets collection
- Created CITATION.cff file
- Updated README

[Browse all 104 contributions →](https://github.com/ParagEkbote?tab=repositories)

---

## Models & Deployments

Beyond code contributions, I maintain models and containerized deployments:

- **[HuggingFace Models](https://huggingface.co/AINovice2005)** - Trained and fine-tuned models
- **[Docker Hub](https://hub.docker.com/u/paragekbote)** - Containerized ML applications
- **[Replicate](https://replicate.com/paragekbote)** - One-click model deployment

---

## Impact

My contributions help:
- **Thousands of developers** use these libraries in production
- **Reduce friction** in ML workflows through better documentation
- **Accelerate research** with community examples and notebooks
- **Improve code quality** through CI/CD and testing improvements
